c4.S2: each remaining non-bg color is a rectangular frame/cage object
c4.S3: chamber count = enclosed open regions in object bbox after closing outer border, object+touching-marker walls, seal near-full divider lines (thr=0.7), drop size-1 pockets
c4.S4: W=max chambers; sort by (chambers, color); row = color*chambers + marker*(W-chambers)
